name: Creamy Vidalia Sauce for Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound long pasta (such as fettucine or spaghetti)
3 large Vidalia onions (or other sweet onions), halved and thinly sliced
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
2. Add the pasta to the boiling water and stir occasionally until it is al dente, as per package instructions.
3. While the pasta cooks, place the halved and thinly sliced onions in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Cook, covered, for about 5 minutes or until the onions are soft and slightly moist.
4. Uncover the skillet, increase the heat to high, add butter and olive oil, and cook for another 5 minutes, stirring frequently. The onions should turn a pale golden brown color.
5. Stir in the minced garlic. Remove from the heat and stir in the sour cream and grated Parmesan cheese. Season with salt and white pepper.
6. Drain the pasta well and toss it with the sauce in a serving bowl.
